PhytoNova Intelligence combines AI disease detection, growth simulation, and smart recommendations to revolutionize how you cultivate crops.

⚡ What We Offer

Everything you need for
precision farming

From AI diagnostics to a thriving community — PhytoNova has every tool to elevate your plantation.

🔬
AI Disease Detection
Upload or capture a photo of your plant. Our AI identifies 42+ diseases with 98% accuracy and provides actionable treatment plans.
📊
Growth Analysis
Simulate crop growth across different soil types, weather patterns, and fertilization strategies. Get data-driven yield predictions.
🛒
Smart Marketplace
Browse and purchase premium fertilizers, seeds, tools, and treatments. Curated recommendations based on your specific crops.
👥
Farmer Community
Connect with thousands of farmers. Share growth progress, exchange tips, and learn from collective experiences worldwide.
🤖
PhytoBot AI Assistant
24/7 AI chatbot trained on agricultural data. Ask anything from planting schedules to pest control and get instant expert answers.
🌡️
Climate Intelligence
Real-time weather integration with smart alerts. Know exactly when to water, fertilize, and harvest for optimal results.
🚀 Process

Up and growing in minutes

1
Create Account
Sign up in 30 seconds with your email and get instant access.
2
Add Your Farm
Tell us about your crops, location, and farming goals.
3
Scan & Analyze
Use AI tools to detect diseases and optimize growth conditions.
4
Harvest Results
Follow recommendations and watch your yields improve dramatically.
💬 Community

★★★★★
"The disease detection saved my entire tomato harvest. Identified early blight before I even noticed the symptoms!"
